word: G5118 - τοσοῦτος - tosoûtos - tos-oo'-tos - As large

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τοσοῦτος

- Transliteration: Tosoutos

- Phonetic: tos-oo'-tos

- Definition:

1. of quantity: so great, so many

2. of time: so long

- Origin: from tosos (so much, apparently from G3588 and G3739) and G3778 (including its variations)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From τόσος tosos (so much; apparently from G3588 and G3739) and G3778 (including its variations); so vast as this that is such (in quantity amount number or space): - as large so great (long many much) these many.
